queries.question: what markets and descriptions are covered by each real estate reporter?
queries.sql: SELECT Markets.market_name, Markets.description  from Real_Estate_Reporters_Markets join Markets on Real_Estate_Reporters_Markets.market_id = Markets.id join Real_Estate_Reporters on Real_Estate_Reporters_Markets.reporter_id = Real_Estate_Reporters.id   GROUP BY Real_Estate_Reporters_Markets.market_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Real_Estate_Reporters_Markets.reporter_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Real_Estate_Reporters)

queries.question: what markets and descriptions are covered by each real estate reporter?
queries.sql: select real_estate_reporters.name , markets.market_name , markets.description from Real_Estate_Reporters_Markets join Markets on Real_Estate_Reporters_Markets.market_id = Markets.id join Real_Estate_Reporters on Real_Estate_Reporters_Markets.reporter_id = Real_Estate_Reporters.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?market_name ?description WHERE {
  ?real_estate_reporters_markets a :Real_Estate_Reporters_Markets .
  ?markets a :Markets .
  ?real_estate_reporters_markets p:hasMarkets ?markets .
  ?real_estate_reporters a :Real_Estate_Reporters .
  ?real_estate_reporters_markets p:hasReal_Estate_Reporters ?real_estate_reporters .
  ?real_estate_reporters p:name ?name .
  ?markets p:market_name ?market_name .
  ?markets p:description ?description .
}

queries.question: Which market is common across all real estate reporters?
queries.sql: SELECT Markets.market_name  from Real_Estate_Reporters_Markets join Markets on Real_Estate_Reporters_Markets.market_id = Markets.id join Real_Estate_Reporters on Real_Estate_Reporters_Markets.reporter_id = Real_Estate_Reporters.id   GROUP BY Real_Estate_Reporters_Markets.market_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Real_Estate_Reporters_Markets.reporter_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Real_Estate_Reporters)

queries.question: What are descriptions of markets all real estate reporters equally cover?
queries.sql: SELECT Markets.description  from Real_Estate_Reporters_Markets join Markets on Real_Estate_Reporters_Markets.market_id = Markets.id join Real_Estate_Reporters on Real_Estate_Reporters_Markets.reporter_id = Real_Estate_Reporters.id   GROUP BY Real_Estate_Reporters_Markets.market_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Real_Estate_Reporters_Markets.reporter_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Real_Estate_Reporters)
